final:
module RefModule(
		input A,
		input B,
		input CarryIn,
		input clk,
		output reg S,
		output reg CarryOut
		);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
	begin
		S = (A ^ B) ^ CarryIn;
		CarryOut = (B & CarryIn) | (A & B) | (A & CarryIn);
	end
endmodule
